title: Dr. Mabuse vs. Scotland Yard
writer: Bryan Edgar Wallace, Norbert Jacques, Ladislas Fodor
actors: Peter van Eyck, Sabine Bethmann, Dieter Borsche
plot: The spirit of the evil Dr. Mabuse takes over the body of a famous professor. The professor/Dr. Mabuse then begins a new crime wave that terrorizes the city.
